items.name: Code-of-Optimization-Enhanced-Machine-Failure-Classification-Using-Critical-Sensor-Features-study
items.description: The study proposed an optimization-driven machine learning framework to predict machine failure. Three models, including Light Gradient Boosting (LGBC), Random Forest Classification (RFC), XGBoost Classification (XGBC), and a hybrid voting ensemble, were developed and subsequently optimized using the Tasmanian Devil Optimization (TDO) algorithm.
